summary: Backfilled the canonical live-apply receipt for ADR 0340 after the latest `origin/main` closeout recorded `coolify-apps-lv3` as the dedicated deployment server, migrated the existing Coolify applications onto it via the documented database repair path, corrected the public edge upstream to `http://10.10.10.71:80`, and verified the repo-smoke ingress on `*.apps.lv3.org`.

verification.check: Dedicated deployment server recorded in canonical stack truth
verification.observed: `versions/stack.yaml` now records `deployment_server_name: coolify-apps-lv3`, `deployment_server_uuid: upsaaj0eoynvncqlorp7y2yj`, `deployment_server_registered: true`, `deployment_server_reachable: true`, `deployment_server_usable: true`, `apps_migration_status: migrated_via_db`, `nginx_edge_updated: true`, and `repo_smoke_public_http_verified: true` for platform version `0.130.96`.

verification.check: Latest-main Coolify migration and edge fixes preserved
verification.observed: Merged commit `591eb347cfda43a4e2ae8d26499211df9536d7b5` records the final live-apply recovery findings and carries the repo changes in `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml`, `scripts/coolify_tool.py`, and `tests/test_coolify_tool.py` to keep `*.apps.lv3.org` on the corrected HTTP upstream, preserve the direct DB migration note, and retain the graceful `422` handling when the Coolify API cannot programmatically move applications.

`docs/adr/0340-dedicated-coolify-apps-vm-separation.md` records ADR 0340 as `Implementation Status: Implemented` with repository version `0.177.153` and platform version `0.130.96`, matching the current observed stack contract.

notes: This receipt backfills the missing canonical live-apply artifact for ADR 0340 so `versions/stack.yaml` references a real receipt instead of a nonexistent filename.
No new Coolify live mutation was performed as part of the ADR 0300 workstream; this file records the already-merged ADR 0340 live apply and its current canonical state.
The application migration completed through the documented direct PostgreSQL repair path because the Coolify API still rejects programmatic server moves with `422`.
